reviews.review_msg: Not great. Slow to mark. No feedback. Quizzes require lots of work to do legitimately by hand with not enough time to do it. Exercises took hours to do by hand. Hard to find the content needed for quizzes and exercises in the lecture notes.
Very hard finals, 70 mcqs at the end I had no time left had to randomly tick

I liked Ghassan. He is very smart to talk to especially about math. 

He cares about students too. 

The course content is complex and gets time to settle in.

Terrible course. 60% in person final exam after an entire semester online, feels cruel. The less people that take this course the better, it should be replaced with something else or at the very least a different professor who cares about the students wellbeing

What kind of professor doesn't give any feedback for a semester-long project that everyone is putting dozens of hours into? Was not a fan of this guy, will not take another class with him. His 20% quizzes were also horrible with topics that weren't taught and next to no time to do the questions.

Everyone mostly gets good grades on assignment and projects, so you guessed it. Your grade is determined by your final exam. I had 72% overall, and ended up with a C. Class was extremely boring and can get mathy. I only took because it was fully online. You could possibly end up with a very cool project and the prof encourages the use of AI for it.

Three quizzes worth a total of 60% of your grade, all online. It's a dense, boring and somewhat directionless look at many medical imaging techniques and equations. The group project is cool and there is a good reason to take this class for that. However, the professor is a mediocre lecturer with difficult, dense and long quizzes that are difficult

Very difficult. This course is just insane. There is no prerequisites (probably because there would be too many to list), yet you need to be an expert in every field from coding to math, biology, physics etc. to be somewhat successful in this course. Quizzes are just crazy. The professor is ok I guess. But how is this even allowed??
This class is an extremely dense and tedious look into the mathematics of various medical imaging techniques and methods. The quizzes are online with an average of

This course is actually terrible. While the assignments are not hard, they are EXTREMELY tedious, and can take hours to do since he wants you to HAND WRITE everything. It is so annoying. I am about to graduate and this is most likely the most boring and pointless course I have ever taken. Unless if you are a masochist do not take.

Videos posted online were an uninspired slog to watch. Homework assignments were fair, but one took so many hours and another other 30 minutes. You NEED reliable team members for the final project, as this is not something you can target solo. I don't feel as though I learned anything. If you don't have extreme self-discipline, avoid.
Avoid......It's not worth spending money and time on taking this class
Pointless course. Dont feel like I learnt anything. There's a group project, would be better off just doing an ML project on your own time.

I really struggled in Ghassan's class. I found it very hard to follow along and pay attention when he taught because the lectures were too boring and plain. However, his lecture notes were very good so I just used those and skipped class. The midterm exams were fair and I did really well on them, but not the final so be careful!
